who i am

About me

I'm a CSE student at Chennai Institute of Technology who doesn't wait to get good — I just build. I'm drawn to hard problems with real stakes and I move fast across a full stack: React frontends, FastAPI backends, ML pipelines, IoT hardware, and cloud deployments.

As Secretary of GDG On Campus CIT, I plan and execute technical workshops, hackathons, and developer-focused community initiatives. I've competed in hackathons across India, finishing Top 10 nationally at Guidewire DevTrails 2026 among 5000+ teams.

I've ranked #1818 globally out of 18,803 teams at IMC Prosperity 4 algorithmic trading — 117 countries, 5 rounds of market simulations. I also spoke at Hackerz CIT 2026 conducting the Open Source & AI Automation workshop, and volunteer at CIT's Embedded Systems & IoT CoE.

When I'm not shipping code, I'm reading at a bookstore.

Software EngineeringAI / MLIoT Hardware Community BuildingAlgo TradingPublic SpeakingOpen Source

what i've built

Projects

🏆 Top 10 Nationally · Guidewire DevTrails 20265000+ Teams
GigEase — AI Parametric Insurance Platform
Auto-detects floods via live APIs → credits UPI in 10 minutes. Zero claim filing. Built for gig delivery workers.
  • Isolation Forest + DBSCAN + GPS-cell tower fusion for 4-layer fraud detection
  • XGBoost + Prophet for dynamic weekly premium pricing
  • Kafka event-driven pipeline: flood detection → payment in under 10 minutes
FastAPIReactXGBoostPostgreSQLCassandraKafkaLangChainRazorpay
GitHub ↗
ARM Bharat SoC Finalist
ShruthiAI — Offline Hindi Voice Assistant
Fully offline Hindi voice assistant on Raspberry Pi. No internet, no cloud — everything local. Built for rural accessibility.
  • On-device STT + NLU + TTS — zero cloud dependency
  • ARM SoC optimised for constrained hardware
Raspberry PiPythonARMOn-device AI

CARES — AI Document Intelligence
